scripts.build:cli: echo 'Running directly from TypeScript - no build needed'
scripts.build:mcp: echo 'Running directly from TypeScript - no build needed'
scripts.build:deps: echo 'Running directly from TypeScript - no build needed'
scripts.build:all: echo 'Only web1 needs building for production' && bun --cwd packages/web1 build
scripts.build:api: echo 'Running directly from TypeScript - no build needed'
scripts.api:build: bun run build:deps && bun --cwd packages/api build
scripts.web:build: bun run build:deps && bun --cwd packages/web1 build
